creator: glarkin@sourcehosting.net
text:
> -----Original Message-----
> From: Edwin Groothuis [mailto:edwin@FreeBSD.org] 
> Sent: Tuesday, October 02, 2007 4:46 AM
> To: glarkin@sourcehosting.net
> Subject: Re: ports/116811: www/zend-framework is out of date
> 
> Maintainer of www/zend-framework,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/116811 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a 
> bug fix you agree on, reply to this email stating that you 
> approve the patch and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/116811
> 
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
> 

Please close this PR as a duplicate.  PR ports/116793 was submitted
yesterday, and www/zend-framework has been updated to v1.0.2.

Regards,
Greg Larkin
SourceHosting.net, LLC
http://www.sourcehosting.net/
